description: AWS Free Tier policy — what aws-pilot is allowed to provision when AWS_PILOT_FREE_TIER_ONLY=true.
notes: Free Tier has THREE flavors: 12-month free (first year only), Always Free, and Trials.
This policy enforces the 12-month + Always Free overlap so users never pay if they stay within limits.
All Trials are excluded by default (they expire and start charging without warning).
Cost Explorer + Budgets API ($0.01/call) is allowed — needed for visibility.

ec2.elastic_ips: 0 (released when not attached; charged when unused)

route53.warning: $0.50/mo per hosted zone — NOT free, but explicitly allowed for $0.50/mo personal use.

blocked_services_default.comment: These services have no free tier OR are extremely easy to leave running and rack up charges.

items.why: Free tier = db.t2.micro 750h, but ALWAYS confirm explicitly — 12mo only
$1/mo per CMK; AWS-managed keys are free
$0.40/mo per secret + $0.05/10k API calls (use SSM Parameter Store instead)
$0.003 per resource recorded — fine tail risk
first trail is free; any 2nd trail is $2/100k events

spend_caps.comment_max_hourly: $0.0117/hr = t3.micro on-demand. Anything pricier requires explicit override.
spend_caps.comment_monthly: Cap of $5/mo combined estimate across all aws-pilot-managed resources. Refuse if going over.

override.how: User must explicitly say 'I accept the cost' AND set: /plugin config aws-pilot free_tier_only=false
